purpose: Own demo-only cluster label anchor projection helpers.
invariants: Feature helpers take explicit config and graph-data inputs instead of importing demo main state.
Graph construction, render-loop scheduling, and DOM mutation remain in demo/src/main.ts.
Preserve existing label text, anchor math, and palette-specific behavior unless intentionally changing visuals.
change_protocols: When adding a new palette label mode, update buildLabelAnchors and verify the demo build.
When moving label DOM behavior, keep live Graph calls owned by demo/src/main.ts.
